title: [ExportVerilog] Avoid splitting wire decl and assign in expr inlining

features.name: wire declaration with direct assignment expression
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration immediately followed by an assign of a combinational expression, which ExportVerilog can inline at declaration site
features.snippet:
wire [7:0] foo;
assign foo = a + b;

features.name: combinational operation result assigned to wire
features.description: Code should include a combinational operation (such as comb.add) whose result is assigned to a wire via sv.assign, where the op sits between wire declaration and assignment in IR
